data.title: 国际服巴哈姆特获奖特别礼物
data.summary: [Bahamut Award Celebratory Special Gift] We won a bronze award in Taiwan’s biggest game website, Bah
data.body:
[Bahamut Award Celebratory Special Gift]

We won a bronze award in Taiwan’s biggest game website, Bahamut's Game & Animation awards! 
Thanks for the love and support, Sensei!

Please check your mailbox for special gifts of Pyroxene x600 and daily 120 AP for 7 days!

#BlueArchive
